model: Codex account default via Codex SDK

trace.action: Created a typed interaction and bounded spatial plan in an isolated no-network workspace.
Allowlisted every hotspot and spatial photo source, rebuilt canonical slots, and revalidated the manifest.
Prepared the schema-safe interaction and spatial preset for rendering.

interaction.prompt: Collect all three lantern hotspots to complete the interaction.

codexAgents.name: Codex interaction and spatial builder
codexAgents.role: Created the story-specific typed mechanic and a bounded spatial plan in an isolated, no-network workspace.
codexAgents.result: The host compiled a collect interaction over 3 existing hotspots and applied the allowlisted memory-corridor preset.

codexAgents.name: Codex output allowlist
codexAgents.role: Host-validated the bounded Codex output without trusting model-authored receipt prose.
codexAgents.result: All 3 interaction IDs and 3 spatial photo IDs resolved uniquely against the input manifest.

codexTests.name: Codex interaction compile
codexTests.detail: The host compiled one collect mechanic from 3 distinct allowlisted hotspot IDs.

codexTests.name: Hotspot allowlist
codexTests.detail: 3 distinct generated interaction references resolve in the scene.

codexTests.name: Spatial plan allowlist
codexTests.detail: 3 distinct photo sources resolve in scene scene-lantern-lane; canonical memory-corridor slots were applied in this order: night-photo-left-lantern → night-photo-center-lantern → night-photo-right-lantern.

codexTests.name: Post-build schema
codexTests.detail: The final manifest passed Zod and referential checks.

note: No family media, credentials, prompts from private users, or temporary workspace paths are retained.
